institution.name: Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Metro
institution.address: Highway #1 Km 16 3 Corner Francisco Sein St

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 61% at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Metro vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.7k vs 6.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Metro fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Metro rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 (18.0% → 23.8%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Metro are 23% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($30.8k vs $25.1k).
